message.content:
@startuml
title Login Sequence GET

skinparam backgroundColor white
skinparam sequence {
  ParticipantPadding 30
  BoxPadding 20
  LifeLineBorderColor #666666
  LifeLineBorderThickness 1
  LifeLineBackgroundColor transparent
  MessageAlign left
}
skinparam participant {
  BackgroundColor #E6E6FA
  BorderColor #666666
  FontColor black
}
skinparam actor {
  BorderColor #666666
  FontColor black
}

actor customer
participant Tomcat

box "entries (UI)" #DDDDDD
participant Index
participant BaseServlet
participant "index.jsp" as index_jsp
participant Login
participant "login.jsp" as login_jsp
end box

customer -> Tomcat : 1 GET /
Tomcat -> Index : 2 doGet()
Index -> BaseServlet : 3 render()
BaseServlet -> index_jsp : 4 forward()
index_jsp -> Login : 5 doGet()
Login -> BaseServlet : 6 render()
BaseServlet -> login_jsp : 7 forward()
Tomcat <-- customer : 8 result

@enduml
